questionHtml: Explain why the frequency recorded by the microphone is lower than the frequency emitted by the loudspeaker.
markschemeHtml:
speed of sound relative to the microphone is less ✓


wavelength unchanged «so frequency is lower»
OR
fewer waves recorded in unit time/per second «so frequency is lower» ✓

meta.title: Explain why the frequency recorded by the microphone is lower than the frequency emitted by the loudspeaker.
